title: Review action should hold CCTV review under conflicting specialist assessments
description: A live operations review action should surface contradictory specialist pressure but keep ONYX composed in CCTV Review until the review gate resolves.
author: zaks

specialistAssessments.summary: CCTV specialist wants live review to stay open until visual verification is complete.
evidence: Review action is already pinned to the watch event.
Visual verification queue is ready for controller review.

specialistAssessments.summary: Track specialist wants Tactical Track open immediately for continuity pressure.
evidence: Perimeter continuity would benefit from immediate track ownership.
missingInfo: Fresh CCTV confirmation has not landed yet.

commandBrainSnapshot.headline: CCTV Review is the next move
commandBrainSnapshot.summary: One next move is staged in CCTV Review.
commandBrainSnapshot.advisory: Specialists disagreed on the next desk (cctv->cctvReview | track->tacticalTrack), so ONYX kept the move in CCTV Review until the conflict resolves.
commandBrainSnapshot.rationale: Scenario replay held the deterministic gate in CCTV Review and synthesized the conflicting specialist pressure instead of pivoting early into another desk.
contextHighlights: CCTV specialist argued for CCTV Review.
Track specialist argued for Tactical Track.
missingInfo: Conflicting specialist recommendations still need reconciliation before the next move is locked.
Fresh CCTV confirmation has not landed yet.
commandBrainSnapshot.followUpPrompt: Reconcile the conflicting specialist recommendations and confirm whether Tactical Track pressure still overrides the review gate.
